mapper.select: SELECT st.id as id, st.user_id as userId, st.order_id as orderId, st.subject as subject, st.category as category, st.priority as priority, st.state_id as stateId, st.assigned_to as assignedTo, st.description as description, st.resolved_at as resolvedAt, st.created_at as createdAt FROM support_tickets st WHERE st.id = #{id}
